title: bata' #0981
definition:
1) to speak rashly or angrily, speak thoughtlessly
    1a) (Qal) one that babbles, speaks rashly (part.)
    1b) (Piel) to speak rashly, unadvisedly
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to speak rashly or angrily, speak thoughtlessly
    1a) (Qal) one that babbles, speaks rashly (part.)
    1b) (Piel) to speak rashly, unadvisedly

    NASB:  to speak rashly or thoughtlessly
